privileged_info_summary: The Nx Witness VMS at https://localhost:7001 uses REST API v1 with Bearer token authentication. Admin credentials are 'admin' / 'Admin1234!'. Five virtual test cameras are configured: Entrance Camera and Lobby Camera (high_traffic group) require 24/7 'always' recording at high quality, 25fps; Parking Lot Camera and Loading Dock Camera (perimeter group) require business hours (08:00-22:00) 'always' recording at high quality, 15fps, with overnight (22:00-08:00 and 00:00-08:00) 'motionOnly' recording at normal quality, 10fps; Server Room Camera (low_priority group) requires weekday 'always' recording at low quality, 5fps, and weekend 'motionOnly' recording at low quality, 5fps. All requirements are specified for all 7 days of the week (Monday-Sunday). The report must be saved to /home/ga/recording_schedule_report.txt.
